# Ochil Hills Management

> Fractional CFO and COO consulting firm for growth-stage small businesses
> ($500K–$7M revenue). Veteran-owned and family-operated, based in Washington
> State and serving clients across the United States. Founded by Matthew Kaiser
> (Fractional CFO) and Kylie Kaiser (Fractional COO), Ochil Hills Management
> embeds both financial and operational executive leadership inside client
> businesses, backed by CAIRN, a proprietary analytics platform.

## Services

- [Services overview](https://ochilmanagement.com/pages/services): Five tiers — Strategic Sprints, Consulting, Fractional CFO, Fractional COO, and Integrated CFO & COO
- [Contact / schedule a consultation](https://ochilmanagement.com/pages/contact)
- [About the founders](https://ochilmanagement.com/pages/about)
- [Portfolio and case studies](https://ochilmanagement.com/pages/portfolio)
- [FAQ](https://ochilmanagement.com/pages/faq)

- [What Is a Fractional CFO? The Complete Guide](https://ochilmanagement.com/blog/what-is-a-fractional-cfo)

- [What Is a Fractional COO?](https://ochilmanagement.com/blog/what-is-a-fractional-coo)
- [Fractional CFO vs COO: Which Do You Need?](https://ochilmanagement.com/blog/fractional-cfo-vs-coo)
- [10 Signs Your Business Needs a Fractional CFO](https://ochilmanagement.com/blog/signs-you-need-a-fractional-cfo)
